evals.expected_output: A new or updated wiki/topics/event-driven-architecture.md synthesizing 5+ atomic notes on the theme, with backlinks to the atomic notes.

evals.prompt: My notes on agentic-systems patterns — see if there's a topic page worth creating.
evals.expected_output: Theme detection across atomic notes; if the threshold is met, a proposed topic page synthesizing the notes.

evals.prompt: Sweep my atomic notes for under-synthesized themes.
evals.expected_output: A list of themes that meet the threshold (default 5+ notes) without an existing topic page; proposes which to consolidate first.
